item.title: Custom Shortcodes
item.description: Columns Details Expand Katek Hints Tabs

item.title: Markdown Syntax
item.description: So, what is markdown? Markdown is a lightweight markup language for creating formatted text using a plain-text editor. John Gruber and Aaron Swartz created Markdown in 2004 as a markup language that is appealing to human readers in its source code form. Codeblocks #include <iostream> /** * This is a multiline comment. **/ int main(int argc, char** argc) { std::cout << "Hello world!" << std::endl; // This is a comment return 0; } Latex support KaTeX shortcode let you render math typesetting in markdown document.
